'''Damarind Corporation''' was a jewel merchant conglomerate. They had an exclusive contract with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to harvest [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gems]] from the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]. They eventually went bankrupt when their gem collection station, the [[Damarind Fishing Station]], failed to collect enough gems.

For some time, the company's biggest competitor was [[Spagga Core, Incorporated]].<ref name="Star Wars Adventure Journal 10">[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]]</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
